conversation.text: Wait are you a real person or a bot?
haha yeah got me. I'm mark, markeye's AI sales agent. same job as any sales rep though, here to figure out if we can actually help with what you need|||what's your situation?
Haha ok fair enough, at least you're honest about it.

yeah no point pretending. the irony is I'm basically a demo of what we build for businesses like yours. so what you're experiencing right now in this chat is pretty much what your leads would get|||pretty cool right? want to see how it works for YOUR company?
